# IDPS Planner

> **PLACEHOLDER** — hand-edit before redistribution. The authors will supply
> the real long-form description after validation.

IDPS Planner is a VCF Operations dashboard for vSphere IDPS (Intrusion
Detection and Prevention System) analysis and planning.

## Authors

Jointly authored by:

- Ryan Pletka
- Brock Peterson
- Scott Bowe
- Geoff Shukin
- Joe Tietz

## Provenance

Extracted from a live VCF Operations lab via the VCF Content Factory extractor.
